---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or God-Tier tweak for Void OS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 The Feature Request
A clear and concise description of what you want to achieve.

## 🤔 Why is this needed?
Explain why Void OS needs this feature. Does it improve FPS? Does it reduce latency? Does it save battery?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If you know the specific registry keys or PowerShell commands needed, list them here.

## ⚠️ Hardware Stability Check
- [ ] I confirm this tweak does NOT break Wi-Fi, Ethernet, or Bluetooth.
- [ ] I confirm this tweak does NOT cause BSODs on standard hardware.

## 📊 Benchmark Evidence (Optional)
If you have CapFrameX or LatencyMon screenshots proving this tweak works, link them here!
